description_long: This is a modern Lenovo laptop with a sleek, matte black finish and a minimalist design. The lid features a subtle Lenovo logo in the upper left corner, while the interior houses a full QWERTY keyboard with a function row and a large touchpad centered below the keyboard. The screen is open and blank, with no visible content or illumination, suggesting it is powered off. The laptop's profile is slim, with visible ports along the sides, including USB and possibly HDMI. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic with some metal reinforcement, and the device is lightweight and portable. No stickers or additional markings are present on the palm rest or lid.
description: A sleek, matte black Lenovo laptop with a blank screen, full keyboard, and visible side ports. The design is minimalist and modern, with a subtle logo on the lid.
description_view_0: The closed lid of the laptop is visible, featuring a matte black surface and a Lenovo logo in the upper left corner.
description_view_1: The left side profile shows the open laptop, revealing the keyboard, touchpad, and some side ports.
description_view_2: The front view displays the full keyboard, large touchpad, and the blank, open screen.
description_view_3: The right side profile highlights the open laptop, keyboard, touchpad, and additional side ports.
attribute_brand_logo: The Lenovo logo is visible on the upper left corner of the laptop lid, rendered in a subtle, raised style matching the lid's color.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and powered off, with no visible content or illumination.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard layout is QWERTY with a function row and no numeric keypad, featuring standard keys and a large touchpad below.
